title: Ervonia Tech
body:
## Introduction:

The Ervonia Tech Modpack is a create focused Modpack, where players will be able to experience the Create Mod with several additives in addition to Farmers Delight in an accesible manner. This modpack has been heavily optimised in order to allow it to run on toaster computers without much trouble.

Download the pack and install it onto a server to play with your all friends, in a Kitchensink Environment.

## Features
- A Highly Optimised Experience
- Kitchensink and Tech Mods
- Shader Compatibility
- End Expansion
- Added Optifine Features

## Mod Acredation:
